title: Ions-electrons-states for the two-component Vlasov-Poisson equation
summary: We establish both local and global bifurcation results for traveling periodic solutions of the one-dimensional two-species Vlasov-Poisson equation. These solutions consist of strip-like regions of ions and electrons in phase space that propagate coherently and emerge from spatially homogeneous, velocity-dependent equilibrium layers. Depending on the geometry of the underlying equilibrium and on the selected Fourier mode, the bifurcation diagram exhibits either two or four solution branches. In all cases, the bifurcation is of pitchfork type; in symmetric configurations, the local structure near the equilibrium has a hyperbolic geometry. We further show that these locally constructed branches extend globally. This work extends the previous study by the same author of the purely electronic case, where the ions were modeled as an immobile neutralizing background. Allowing both species to evolve dynamically leads to a more intricate, higher-dimensional analysis. Finally, by means of an affine change of variables, we reveal a connection with the one-dimensional two-component Euler-Poisson system, which in turn enables the construction of traveling periodic waves of both small and large amplitude for that model as well.

AI.tldr: 建立了单维双物种Vlasov-Poisson方程行波周期解的局部分岔和全局分岔理论
AI.motivation: 研究一维双物种Vlasov-Poisson方程的行波周期解，这些解由相空间中离子和电子的带状区域组成，从空间均匀、速度依赖的平衡层中分岔出来。扩展了作者先前研究的纯电子情况，当时将离子建模为固定的中和背景，现在允许两个物种都动态演化。
AI.techniques: 使用局部分岔和全局分岔理论，分析相空间几何结构，通过仿射变量变换建立与一维双组分Euler-Poisson系统的联系，进行高维分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了行波周期解的局部分岔结果（叉形分岔），揭示了分岔图显示2或4个解分支，在对称构型中局部分岔具有双曲几何结构，并证明了这些局部分支可以全局延拓
AI.significance: 扩展了等离子体物理中Vlasov-Poisson方程的行波解理论，为双物种动力学提供了新的数学框架，通过建立与Euler-Poisson系统的联系，为两个模型的小振幅和大振幅行波周期解构造提供了统一方法

title: A strong unique continuation result for the Baouendi operator
summary: We establish a strong unique continuation property for the subelliptic Baouendi operator under the presence of zero-order perturbations satisfying an almost Hardy-type growth condition. In particular, the admissible class includes both $L^\infty_{\mathrm{loc}}$ and singular potentials. We prove that any solution vanishing to infinite order at a point of the degeneracy manifold of the operator must be identically zero. The result holds extends to variable-coefficient operators with intrinsic Lipschitz regularity. A notable feature of the proof is that it relies exclusively on $L^2$ Carleman estimates combined with the classical Hardy inequality.

AI.tldr: 证明了次椭圆Baouendi算子在满足几乎Hardy型增长条件的零阶扰动下的强唯一延拓性质
AI.motivation: 研究退化椭圆算子的唯一延拓性质，特别是次椭圆Baouendi算子在奇异势能扰动下的强唯一延拓问题，这类算子在退化流形上具有奇异性
AI.techniques: 主要使用L² Carleman估计与经典Hardy不等式相结合的方法，完全基于L²框架，避免使用更高阶的正则性假设
AI.main_theorems: 证明了次椭圆Baouendi算子在满足几乎Hardy型增长条件的零阶扰动下具有强唯一延拓性质：任何在算子退化流形某点处具有无穷阶零点的解必恒为零；结果可推广到具有本征Lipschitz正则性的变系数算子
AI.significance: 扩展了退化椭圆算子唯一延拓理论，首次将强唯一延拓性质推广到包含奇异势能的情形，为研究次椭圆偏微分方程的正则性和唯一性提供了新工具

title: Electrostatic effects on critical regularity and long-time behavior of viscous compressible fluids
summary:
We consider the compressible Navier-Stokes-Poisson equations in $\mathbb{R}^d$ ($d\geq2$), a classical model for barotropic compressible flows coupled with a self-consistent electrostatic potential. We show that the electrostatic coupling has a significant impact on the long-time dynamics of solutions due to its underlying Klein-Gordon structure. As a first result, we prove the global well-posedness of the Cauchy problem with initial data near equilibrium in the full-frequency $L^{p}$-type critical Besov space \emph{without relying on hyperbolic symmetrization}. Compared with the Poisson-free case studied in several milestone works [Charve and Danchin, Arch. Rational Mech. Anal., 198 (2010), 233-271; Chen, Miao and Zhang, Commun. Pure Appl. Math., 63 (2010), 1173-1224; Haspot, Arch. Rational Mech. Anal., 202 (2011), 427-460], we remove the extra $L^{2}$ assumption in low frequencies and extend the admissible choice of $p$ to the sharp range $1\leq p<2d$. This is, to the best of our knowledge, the first result in compressible fluids that allows the initial velocity field to be highly oscillatory across all frequencies.
  Furthermore, stemming from the Poisson coupling, the density and velocity exhibit distinct low-frequency behaviors. Motivated by this feature, we propose a general $L^p$-type low-frequency assumption and establish the optimal convergence rates of global solutions toward equilibrium. For a broad class of indices, this assumption yields faster decay than those obtained under the classical $L^1$ framework. To this end, we develop a time-weighted energy method, which is of interest and enables us to capture maximal decay estimates without additional smallness of initial data.

AI.tldr: 证明了可压缩Navier-Stokes-Poisson方程在临界Besov空间中的全局适定性，并建立了最优收敛速率
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩Navier-Stokes-Poisson方程（描述带静电势的压缩流体）的长时间动力学，特别关注静电耦合对解行为的影响
AI.techniques: 使用全频率L^p型临界Besov空间框架，避免双曲对称化方法，发展时间加权能量方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在临界Besov空间中证明全局适定性，去除低频L^2假设，扩展p的范围到最优区间1≤p<2d；2. 建立解向平衡态的最优收敛速率
AI.significance: 首次在可压缩流体中允许初始速度场在所有频率上高度振荡，揭示了静电耦合的Klein-Gordon结构对长时间行为的重要影响

title: Principal spectral theory and asymptotic analysis for time-periodic cooperative systems with temporally nonlocal dispersal
summary: This paper investigates the principal spectral theory and the asymptotic behavior of the principal spectrum point for a class of time-periodic cooperative systems with nonlocal dispersal operators, incorporating both coupled and uncoupled nonlocal terms. By applying the theory of resolvent positive operators and their perturbations, we first establish criteria for the existence of the principal eigenvalue. We then construct sequences of smooth upper and lower approximating matrix-valued functions, each of whose corresponding operators satisfies the principal eigenvalue existence condition. This approximation framework allows the principal spectrum point to effectively substitute for the principal eigenvalue in characterizing the global dynamics of the nonlinear system. Moreover, it facilitates the study of the asymptotic behavior of the principal spectrum point with respect to parameters under fairly general assumptions. Subsequently, for systems with both coupled and uncoupled nonlocal terms, we analyze the asymptotic behavior of the principal spectrum point in terms of the dispersal rate, dispersal range, and frequency. Finally, we illustrate the applicability of our theoretical results through a Zika virus model and a stem cell model.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了具有非局部扩散算子的时周期合作系统主谱点的存在性判据和渐近行为理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有非局部扩散算子的时周期合作系统的主谱理论，这类系统在生物学和流行病学中有重要应用（如寨卡病毒模型和干细胞模型），但非局部项和时周期性的结合带来了数学上的挑战
AI.techniques: 使用预解正算子理论及其扰动理论；构造光滑的上下逼近矩阵值函数序列；建立主谱点对主特征值的有效替代框架
AI.main_theorems: 建立了主特征值存在的判据；证明了主谱点可以替代主特征值刻画非线性系统的全局动力学；分析了主谱点关于扩散率、扩散范围和频率的渐近行为
AI.significance: 为具有非局部扩散的时周期合作系统提供了统一的理论框架；建立了主谱点作为主特征值有效替代的理论基础；在流行病学和生物学模型中有直接应用价值

title: Homogenization of nonlocal equations in randomly evolving media. Diffusion approximation
summary: The paper deals with homogenization and higher order approximations of solutions to nonlocal evolution equations of convolution type whose coefficients are periodic in the spatial variables and random stationary in time. We assume that the convolution kernel has finite moments up to order three. Under proper mixing assumptions, we study the limit behavior of the normalized difference between solutions of the original and the homogenized problems and show that this difference converges to the solution of a linear stochastic partial differential equation.

AI.tldr: 研究具有时空随机系数的非局部演化方程的均匀化及高阶近似，证明归一化解差收敛于线性随机偏微分方程解
AI.motivation: 研究具有周期空间变量和随机平稳时间系数的非局部演化方程的均匀化问题，这类方程在材料科学、随机介质等领域有重要应用，需要理解随机时间扰动下的渐近行为
AI.techniques: 使用均匀化理论、随机过程分析、混合条件假设、卷积核矩估计、随机偏微分方程极限理论
AI.main_theorems: 在适当混合假设下，证明原始问题与均匀化问题解的归一化差值收敛到线性随机偏微分方程的解
AI.significance: 为非局部演化方程的随机均匀化理论提供严格数学基础，建立随机时间扰动下的高阶近似理论，为随机介质中的波传播、扩散过程等应用提供理论支持

title: Differential Complexes in Time-Periodic Gelfand-Shilov Spaces
summary: We study the global solvability of a class of differential complexes on the product manifold $\mathbb{T}^m \times \mathbb{R}^n$ associated with systems of evolution operators of the form $L_r = \partial_{t_r} + ia_r(t)P(x,D_x), r=1,\ldots,m,$ where the coefficients $a_r$ are real-valued Gevrey functions on the torus and $P(x,D_x)$ is a globally elliptic normal differential operator on $\mathbb{R}^n$. Within the framework of time-periodic Gelfand--Shilov spaces, we introduce a natural differential complex generated by these operators and investigate its solvability in both functional and ultradistributional settings. We provide a complete characterization of global solvability in terms of a Diophantine condition involving the constant part of the associated $1$-form and the spectrum of $P$. We also analyze global hypoellipticity of the complex. These results extend previous works on scalar operators and constant coefficient systems to the setting of differential complexes with time-dependent real coefficients.

AI.tldr: 建立了乘积流形上由演化算子生成的微分复形的全局可解性理论，给出了Diophantine条件下的完全刻画。
AI.motivation: 研究乘积流形 $\mathbb{T}^m \times \mathbb{R}^n$ 上由演化算子 $L_r = \partial_{t_r} + ia_r(t)P(x,D_x)$ 生成的微分复形的全局可解性问题，其中系数 $a_r$ 是环面上的实值Gevrey函数，$P(x,D_x)$ 是 $\mathbb{R}^n$ 上的全局椭圆正规微分算子。
AI.techniques: 利用时间周期Gelfand-Shilov空间框架，通过Diophantine条件分析，结合算子谱理论和微分复形理论，在函数和超分布两种设定下研究可解性。
AI.main_theorems: 给出了微分复形全局可解性的完全刻画，条件涉及关联1-形式的常数部分和算子P的谱的Diophantine条件；同时分析了复形的全局亚椭圆性。
AI.significance: 将标量算子和常系数系统的结果推广到具有时间依赖实系数的微分复形情形，为演化方程系统的全局分析提供了新框架，在偏微分方程理论和数学物理中有应用价值。

title: A Lions' type formula for some reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces of fractional harmonic functions
summary: In \cite{Lions}, J. L. Lions considered a reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) of harmonic functions on a regular domain with Sobolev traces and obtained a formula that expresses the kernel of this space as an integral on the boundary of some derivatives of the Green function associated with the Laplace operator and the homogeneous Dirichlet boundary condition. This result was simplified and extended later by Englis, Lukkassen, Peetre, and Persson in \cite{ELPL} to more general elliptic systems of even orders. In particular, they emphasized that the resemblance between Lions' type formula and the Hadamard variational formula only appears when the operator is of order $2$. In this paper, we investigate some RKHS of $a$-harmonic functions, where $a$ in $(0,1)$ refers to a fractional exponent of the Laplace operator. For such fractional order pseudo-differential operators, the local nonhomogeneous Dirichlet problem can be addressed by means of some $a$-transmission Sobolev spaces, which were introduced by Hörmander in the sixties and recently developed by Grubb in a series of papers. We deduce from these works a fractional Poisson formula, which is applied to obtain a Lions' type formula. We observe, in particular, that despite the order of the operator not being $2$, this formula resembles the Hadamard variational formula that we prove in the companion paper \cite{sidy-franck_1}. As a complementary remark, we observe that for a family of RKHS associated with the steady Stokes system, a second order system, there is also a Lions' type formula for their two-point kernels, which turn out not to be similar to the corresponding Hadamard variation formula.

AI.tldr: 该论文将Lions的再生核公式推广到分数阶拉普拉斯算子，发现即使算子阶数不为2，所得公式仍与Hadamard变分公式相似。
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶拉普拉斯算子的a-调和函数再生核Hilbert空间，将Lions关于调和函数再生核的经典结果推广到分数阶情形，并探讨其与Hadamard变分公式的关系。
AI.techniques: 使用分数阶传输Sobolev空间理论、分数阶Poisson公式、再生核Hilbert空间方法，以及分数阶椭圆算子的边界值问题分析。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了分数阶拉普拉斯算子的Lions型公式，证明即使算子阶数不为2，该公式仍与Hadamard变分公式相似；同时指出对于稳态Stokes系统，其再生核公式与相应Hadamard变分公式不相似。
AI.significance: 扩展了经典再生核理论到分数阶算子，揭示了算子阶数与公式相似性之间的微妙关系，为分数阶PDE的再生核方法提供了理论基础。

title: Sharp Sobolev and Moser-Trudinger inequalities on noncompact Riemannian manifolds with Ricci curvature bounded below
summary: We establish Sobolev and Moser-Trudinger inequalities with best constants on noncompact Riemannan manifolds with Ricci curvature bounded below, and positive injectivity radius.

AI.tldr: 在Ricci曲率有下界且具正单射半径的非紧黎曼流形上建立了具有最佳常数的Sobolev和Moser-Trudinger不等式。
AI.motivation: 研究非紧黎曼流形上的函数空间嵌入理论，特别是在几何条件较弱（仅Ricci曲率有下界）的情况下，建立最优的Sobolev和Moser-Trudinger不等式，这是分析几何和偏微分方程中的重要问题。
AI.techniques: 利用Ricci曲率有下界和正单射半径的几何条件，结合流形上的分析技术，可能涉及等周不等式、热核估计、最优传输理论或几何测度论方法。
AI.main_theorems: 在Ricci曲率有下界且具正单射半径的非紧黎曼流形上，证明了具有最佳常数的Sobolev不等式和Moser-Trudinger不等式。
AI.significance: 扩展了经典欧氏空间中的Sobolev和Moser-Trudinger不等式到更一般的几何背景，为研究非紧流形上的椭圆型偏微分方程提供了重要的函数空间工具，在几何分析和数学物理中有广泛应用。

title: Static class-guided selection of elementary solutions in non-monotone vanishing discount problems
summary: We study a generalized vanishing discount problem for Hamilton--Jacobi equations, removing the standard monotonicity assumption, either in a global sense or when integrated against all Mather measures. Specifically, we consider \[ λa(x)u(x)+H(x,Du(x))-Aλ=c_0, \] with a suitably chosen constant $A>0$. By appropriately changing the signs of the function $a(x)$ on different static classes associated with $H$, we show that the maximal viscosity solution converges uniformly as $λ\to 0^+$ and that all elementary solutions of the stationary equation \[ H(x,Du(x))=c_0 \] can be selected as limits. This provides the first result for selecting multiple viscosity solutions in vanishing discount problems beyond the usual monotonicity and integral assumptions, as long as $a(x)$ is positive on one static class. Our results highlight the crucial role of static classes in controlling the asymptotic behavior of viscosity solutions. Previously, under usual monotonicity assumptions, only a single solution could be selected (as discussed in \cite{GL}), whereas our approach allows controlled selection of multiple solutions via static class-guided discount coefficients.

AI.tldr: 首次在无单调性假设下，通过静态类引导的折扣系数实现了Hamilton-Jacobi方程消失折扣问题中多个粘性解的选择。
AI.motivation: 研究Hamilton-Jacobi方程的广义消失折扣问题，突破传统单调性假设（全局或对Mather测度积分）的限制，探索在更一般条件下多个粘性解的渐近行为选择机制。
AI.techniques: 利用静态类理论，在不同静态类上适当改变函数a(x)的符号，通过精心选择的常数A>0，构造控制折扣系数的技术，实现多个解的渐近收敛选择。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在a(x)至少在一个静态类上为正的条件下，最大粘性解在λ→0⁺时一致收敛，且所有平稳方程H(x,Du(x))=c₀的基本解都可以被选为极限，这是首次在无单调性假设下实现多个粘性解的选择。
AI.significance: 突破了消失折扣问题中只能选择单个解的传统限制，揭示了静态类在控制粘性解渐近行为中的关键作用，为Hamilton-Jacobi方程的渐近分析提供了新视角和方法。

title: One-Sided and Parabolic BLO Spaces with Time Lag and Their Applications to Muckenhoupt $A_1$ Weights and Doubly Nonlinear Parabolic Equations
summary: In this article, we first introduce the one-sided BLO space $\mathrm{BLO}^+(\mathbb{R})$ and characterize it, respectively, in terms of the one-sided Muckenhoupt class $A_1^+(\mathbb{R})$ and the one-sided John--Nirenberg inequality. Using these, we establish the Coifman--Rochberg type decomposition of $\mathrm{BLO}^+(\mathbb{R})$ functions and show that $\mathrm{BLO}^+(\mathbb{R})$ is independent of the distance between the two intervals, which further induces the characterization of this space in terms of the one-sided BMO space $\mathrm{BMO}^+(\mathbb{R})$ (the Bennett type lemma). As applications, we prove that any $\mathrm{BMO}^+(\mathbb{R})$ function can split into the sum of two $\mathrm{BLO}^+(\mathbb{R})$ functions and we provide an explicit description of the distance from $\mathrm{BLO}^+(\mathbb{R})$ functions to $L^\infty(\mathbb{R})$. Finally, as a higher-dimensional analogue we introduce the parabolic BLO space $\mathrm{PBLO}_γ^-(\mathbb{R}^{n+1})$ with time lag, and we extend all the above one-dimensional results to $\mathrm{PBLO}_γ^-(\mathbb{R}^{n+1})$; furthermore, as applications, we not only establish the relationships between $\mathrm{PBLO}_γ^-(\mathbb{R}^{n+1})$ and the solutions of doubly nonlinear parabolic equations, but also provide a necessary condition for the negative logarithm of the parabolic distance function to belong to $\mathrm{PBLO}_γ^-(\mathbb{R}^{n+1})$ in terms of the weak porosity of the set.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了一维单边BLO空间及其高维抛物推广，建立了与A_1^+类、John-Nirenberg不等式、BMO^+空间的等价刻画，并应用于抛物方程解的分析。
AI.motivation: 研究单边BLO空间的系统理论，建立其与经典单边函数空间（如A_1^+类、BMO^+空间）的等价关系，并推广到高维抛物情形，为分析抛物方程解提供新工具。
AI.techniques: 使用Coifman-Rochberg型分解、Bennett型引理、John-Nirenberg不等式、弱孔隙性分析，以及抛物距离函数和时滞参数的引入。
AI.main_theorems: 1) BLO^+空间与A_1^+类和John-Nirenberg不等式的等价刻画；2) BMO^+函数可分解为两个BLO^+函数之和；3) BLO^+到L^∞距离的显式描述；4) 抛物BLO空间PBLO_γ^-的建立及一维结果的推广；5) PBLO_γ^-与双非线性抛物方程解的关系。
AI.significance: 完善了单边函数空间理论体系，为抛物偏微分方程的正则性分析提供了新框架，建立了BLO空间与几何测度论（弱孔隙性）的联系，具有重要的理论价值。

title: Phase Transition With Rapini-Papoular Surface Anchoring
summary: We analyze the dynamical (in)stability of nematic liquid crystals in the presence of external magnetic fields and Rapini-Papoular surface potential. The P-HAN transition is investigated using a simplified 3D Ericksen-Leslie system. We find the thickness threshold of the P-HAN transition. If the thickness of the nematic layer exceeds this threshold, there is a global-in-time suitable weak solution converging exponentially to a nontrivial equilibrium state as time tends to infinity. If the thickness is no more than the threshold, the global-in-time suitable weak solution has a trivial long-time asymptotic limit. Our results rigorously justify the P-HAN transition discussed in the physics literature.

AI.tldr: 建立了向列相液晶P-HAN转变的厚度阈值理论，并证明了不同厚度下全局弱解的长时间渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究在外加磁场和Rapini-Papoular表面势作用下向列相液晶的动力学稳定性，特别是P-HAN转变现象，为物理文献中的讨论提供严格数学基础
AI.techniques: 使用简化的3D Ericksen-Leslie系统，建立全局适定性弱解理论，分析厚度阈值对长时间渐近行为的影响
AI.main_theorems: 发现了P-HAN转变的厚度阈值：超过阈值时全局弱解指数收敛到非平凡平衡态；不超过阈值时全局弱解长时间渐近趋于平凡极限
AI.significance: 首次从数学上严格证明了向列相液晶P-HAN转变的厚度阈值理论，为液晶物理中的相变现象提供了坚实的数学基础

title: The $N$-dimensional gravity driven Muskat problem
summary: We study the Muskat problem, which describes the motion of two immiscible, incompressible fluids in a homogeneous porous medium occupying the full space ${\mathbb{R}^{N+1}}$, $N \geq 2$, driven by gravity. The interface between the fluids is given as graph of a function over $\mathbb{R}^N$. The problem is reformulated as a nonlinear, nonlocal evolution problem for this function, involving singular integrals arising from potential representations of the velocity and pressure fields. Using results from harmonic analysis, we demonstrate that the evolution is of parabolic type in the open set identified by the Rayleigh-Taylor condition. We use the abstract theory of such problems to establish that the Muskat problem defines a semiflow on this set in all subcritical Sobolev spaces $H^s(\mathbb{R}^N)$, $s>s_c$, where ${s_c=1+N/2}$ is the critical exponent. We additionally obtain parabolic smoothing up to ${\rm C}^\infty$.

AI.tldr: 建立了Muskat问题在Rayleigh-Taylor条件确定的开集上作为Sobolev空间中的半流，并证明了抛物型正则化效应
AI.motivation: 研究多孔介质中两种不可混溶、不可压缩流体在重力驱动下的界面演化问题，即Muskat问题，该问题可转化为描述界面函数的非线性非局部演化方程
AI.techniques: 利用调和分析处理奇异积分，应用抛物型演化方程的抽象理论，在Sobolev空间中建立半流结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Muskat问题在Rayleigh-Taylor条件确定的开集上定义了所有次临界Sobolev空间H^s(R^N) (s>s_c=1+N/2)中的半流，并获得直到C^∞的抛物型正则化
AI.significance: 为Muskat问题提供了严格的数学框架，建立了其作为抛物型演化方程的性质，为后续稳定性分析和数值模拟奠定了理论基础

title: Large time decay of the Oseen flow in exterior domains subject to the Navier slip-with-friction boundary condition
summary: Consider the motion of a viscous incompressible fluid filling a 3D exterior domain $Ω$ subject to the Navier slip-with-friction boundary condition as well as outflow at infinity. For the Oseen system as the linearization, we discuss the resolvent set under a certain relationship among the geometry of the boundary $\partialΩ$, friction coefficient $α(x)$ and the outflow $u_\infty$. We then study the regularity of the resolvent near the origin in the complex plane to develop $L^q$-$L^r$ decay estimates of the Oseen semigroup provided that $α(x)+u_\infty\cdotν(x)/2\geq 0$ for every $x\in\partialΩ$, where $ν(x)$ stands for the outward unit normal to the boundary $\partialΩ$.

AI.tldr: 研究3D外区域Navier滑移边界条件下Oseen系统的解析性和半群衰减估计
AI.motivation: 研究粘性不可压缩流体在三维外区域中的运动，考虑Navier滑移边界条件和无穷远出流条件，分析线性化Oseen系统的解析性质
AI.techniques: 复平面上的解析理论、半群理论、L^q-L^r衰减估计、边界几何与摩擦系数的关系分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在边界几何、摩擦系数α(x)和出流u_∞特定关系下确定Oseen系统的预解集；2) 在α(x)+u_∞·ν(x)/2≥0条件下建立原点附近预解的正则性；3) 推导Oseen半群的L^q-L^r衰减估计
AI.significance: 为外区域Navier滑移边界流体问题提供解析理论基础，建立衰减估计对研究长时间行为和非线性稳定性有重要意义

title: Convergence to pushed fronts and the behavior of level sets in monostable reaction-diffusion equations
summary: We study the behavior of solutions of a monostable reaction-diffusion equation $u_t=Δ_x u +u_{yy} +f(u)$ ($x \in \mathbb{R}^{n-1}$, $y \in \mathbb{R}$, $t>0$), with the unstable equilibrium point $0$ and the stable equilibrium point $1$. Under the condition that the corresponding one-dimensional equation has a pushed front $Φ_{c^*}(z)$ with $Φ_{c^*}(-\infty)=1$, $Φ_{c^*}(\infty)=0$, we show that the solution $u(x,y,t)$ approaches $Φ_{c^*}(y-γ(x,t))$ for some $γ(x,t)$ as $t \to \infty$, if initially $u(x,y,0)$ decays sufficiently fast as $y \to \infty$ and is bounded below by some positive constant near $y=-\infty$. It is also shown that $γ(x,t)$ is approximated by the mean curvature flow with a drift term.

AI.tldr: 证明了在特定条件下，单稳态反应扩散方程的解会趋近于具有漂移项的平均曲率流驱动的推移波前。
AI.motivation: 研究高维空间中单稳态反应扩散方程解的长时间行为，特别是波前解在空间非均匀初始条件下的演化规律。
AI.techniques: 利用推移波前理论、平均曲率流分析、渐近展开方法，以及反应扩散方程的长时间行为分析技术。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当一维方程存在推移波前时，高维解会趋近于该波前的平移形式，且平移函数近似满足带漂移项的平均曲率流。
AI.significance: 建立了高维反应扩散方程波前解与几何流之间的联系，为理解复杂空间结构中波的传播提供了理论框架。

title: A direct method for doubly nonlinear equations via convexification in spaces of measures and duality
summary:
Existence of solutions to doubly nonlinear equations in reflexive Banach spaces is established by resorting to a global-in-time variational approach inspired by De Giorgi's principle, which characterizes the associated flows as null-minimizers of a suitable energy-dissipation functional defined on trajectories. In contrast to the celebrated minimizing movements scheme, the proposed strategy does not rely on any time-discretization or iterative constructions. Instead, it provides a direct method based on the relaxation of the problem in spaces of measures, constrained by the continuity equation: in this procedure, no gap is introduced due to the Ambrosio's superposition principle.
  Within this weak convex framework, the validity of the null-minimization property is recovered through two further steps. First, a careful application of the Von Neumann minimax theorem yields an identification of the dual problem as a supremum over the set of smooth and bounded cylinder functions, solving an Hamilton-Jacobi-type inequality. Secondly, a suitable "backward boundedness" property of solutions to such Hamilton-Jacobi system gives a proper bound of the dual problem, ensuring that the minimum value of the original functional is actually zero.
  The proposed strategy naturally extends to non-autonomous equations, encompassing time- and space-dependent dissipation potentials and time-dependent potential energies.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于全局变分方法的直接策略，在自反Banach空间中建立双非线性方程解的存在性，无需时间离散化。
AI.motivation: 研究自反Banach空间中双非线性方程解的存在性问题，传统的最小运动方案需要时间离散化和迭代构造，本文旨在发展一种不依赖时间离散化的直接方法。
AI.techniques: 采用De Giorgi原理启发的全局变分方法，在测度空间中通过连续性方程约束进行松弛，运用Ambrosio叠加原理避免间隙，结合Von Neumann极小极大定理识别对偶问题，以及Hamilton-Jacobi型不等式的解的后向有界性分析。
AI.main_theorems: 在自反Banach空间中建立了双非线性方程解的存在性定理，证明了相应流是定义在轨迹上的能量耗散泛函的零极小化子，并将方法推广到非自治方程情形。
AI.significance: 提供了处理双非线性PDE的新变分框架，避免了传统时间离散化方法的复杂性，方法具有直接性和一般性，可应用于时空调度依赖的耗散势能和势能函数，对梯度流理论和变分方法有重要贡献。

title: Multi-species kinetic models: GENERIC formulation and Fisher information
summary: In this paper, we study the GENERIC structures of multi-species spatially inhomogeneous Boltzmann and Landau equations with Bose-Einstein, Maxwell-Boltzmann, and Fermi-Dirac statistics. In addition, under suitable assumptions on the collision kernels, we show that the Fisher information for the multi-species spatially homogeneous Boltzmann equation is non-increasing in time.

AI.tldr: 建立了多组分Boltzmann和Landau方程的GENERIC结构，并证明了多组分空间齐次Boltzmann方程Fisher信息的时间非增性
AI.motivation: 研究多组分空间非齐次Boltzmann和Landau方程在Bose-Einstein、Maxwell-Boltzmann和Fermi-Dirac统计下的热力学结构，特别是这些系统的耗散特性
AI.techniques: GENERIC（General Equation for Non-Equilibrium Reversible-Irreversible Coupling）框架，Fisher信息分析，碰撞核的适当假设
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了多组分Boltzmann和Landau方程的GENERIC结构；2. 证明了多组分空间齐次Boltzmann方程Fisher信息的时间非增性
AI.significance: 为多组分气体动力学系统提供了统一的热力学框架，揭示了这些系统的耗散特性，对非平衡统计力学和稀薄气体动力学有重要理论意义

title: Regularity for Doubly Nonlinear Equations in the Mixed Regime
summary: We study the local Hölder continuity of nonnegative solutions to doubly nonlinear equations by introducing a new technique that allows us to treat the cases where the equation is both singular and degenerate, up to specific Barenblatt numbers. Our argument relies on a new integral $L^1$-$L^1$ Harnack estimate, of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种处理双重非线性方程局部Hölder连续性的新方法，统一处理奇异和退化情形
AI.motivation: 研究双重非线性方程非负解的局部Hölder连续性，这类方程同时包含奇异和退化特性，传统方法难以统一处理
AI.techniques: 引入新积分技术，建立L^1-L^1型Harnack估计，该方法具有独立理论价值
AI.main_theorems: 证明了非负解在特定Barenblatt数范围内的局部Hölder连续性，建立了新的积分Harnack不等式
AI.significance: 统一处理奇异和退化双重非线性方程，为这类重要PDE的正则性理论提供新工具，Harnack估计具有广泛应用潜力

title: A Viscosity Framework for Dynamic Programming Principles and Applications
summary: In this work we introduce a viscosity-based notion of solution for general approximation schemes associated with partial differential equations, such as dynamic programming principles~(DPPs). A key feature of our approach is that it bypasses any measurability requirement on solutions of the DPP, an assumption that is often difficult to verify and may even fail in relevant examples. We establish a comparison principle between classical strict supersolutions and viscosity subsolutions of the DPP, which yields stability results under minimal and natural hypotheses. As a consequence, we prove existence of viscosity solutions of the DPP and their convergence to viscosity solutions of a PDE that is consistent with the underlying approximation scheme. Moreover, we show that solutions of the limiting PDE admit an asymptotic expansion encoded by the approximation operator. Finally, we demonstrate that a broad class of local, nonlocal, and nonlinear partial differential equations fits into our framework, recovering known examples in the literature and completing gaps in the existing literature.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于粘性解概念的通用PDE近似格式解的定义，绕过了传统方法中对可测性的要求。
AI.motivation: 传统动态规划原理(DPPs)等PDE近似格式中，解的可测性假设难以验证甚至可能失效，需要一种不依赖可测性假设的通用解框架。
AI.techniques: 粘性解理论、比较原理、稳定性分析、渐近展开方法，建立经典严格上解与粘性下解之间的比较原理。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了DPP的粘性解比较原理；2) 证明了粘性解的存在性；3) 证明了近似解收敛于与格式一致的PDE粘性解；4) 展示了极限PDE解具有由近似算子编码的渐近展开。
AI.significance: 为广泛的局部、非局部和非线性PDE提供了统一的粘性解框架，填补了现有文献空白，简化了近似格式的理论分析。

title: Quantitative estimates for the forced Navier-Stokes equations and applications
summary: In this paper, we prove a localisation of a slightly supercritical (Orlicz) regularity criterion for the 3D incompressible Navier-Stokes equations. This is a refinement to the recent partial positive answer to Tao's conjecture [Tao21] as given in [BP21b]. The proof requires new quantitative estimates for critically bounded solutions of the forced Navier-Stokes equations, where the forcing is induced by the localisation. A by-product of these new estimates is an application to the Boussinesq equations, where we prove a quantitative blow-up rate for the critical $L^3$ norm of the velocity. We prove these quantitative estimates using Carleman inequalities as in [Tao21], and subsequently in [BP21a], with an additional forcing term. An obstacle to doing this is that, in the Carleman inequalities, the forcing term is amplified on large scales. Additionally, the low regularity of the forcing requires the addition of Caccioppoli-type estimates to deal with the Carleman inequalities appropriately.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在Orlicz空间中的局部化超临界正则性准则
AI.motivation: 本文研究三维Navier-Stokes方程的正则性准则问题，特别是对Tao猜想[2021]的进一步细化。Tao猜想涉及Navier-Stokes方程在临界空间中的正则性，而本文在[BP21b]部分肯定回答的基础上，研究局部化的超临界正则性准则。
AI.techniques: 主要使用Carleman不等式技术，结合Caccioppoli型估计处理低正则性强迫项，发展了受迫Navier-Stokes方程临界有界解的定量估计方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了三维Navier-Stokes方程在Orlicz空间中的局部化超临界正则性准则；2. 建立了受迫Navier-Stokes方程临界有界解的定量估计；3. 将结果应用于Boussinesq方程，得到了速度临界L^3范数的定量爆破速率。
AI.significance: 这是对Tao猜想研究的重要进展，提供了更精细的正则性准则。发展的定量估计方法具有普适性，可应用于其他流体方程。对Boussinesq方程的应用展示了该技术的广泛适用性。

title: Stability and bifurcation analysis in a mechanochemical model of pattern formation
summary: We analyze the stability and bifurcation structure of steady states in a mechanochemical model of pattern formation in regenerating tissue spheroids. The model couples morphogen dynamics with tissue mechanics via a positive feedback loop: mechanical stretching enhances morphogen production, while morphogen concentration modulates tissue elasticity. Global strain conservation implements a nonlocal inhibitory effect, realizing a mechanochemical variant of the local activation--long-range inhibition mechanism. For exponential elasticity-morphogen coupling, the system admits a variational formulation. We prove existence of nonconstant steady states for small diffusion and uniqueness of the homogeneous state for large diffusion. Linear stability analysis shows that only unimodal patterns are stable, while multimodal solutions are unstable. Bifurcation analysis reveals subcritical and supercritical pitchforks, with fold bifurcations generating bistable regimes. Our results demonstrate that mechanochemical feedback provides a robust mechanism for single-peaked pattern formation without requiring a second diffusible inhibitor.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了在再生组织球体的力学化学模型中，力学化学反馈为单峰模式形成提供了稳健机制，无需第二个可扩散抑制剂。
AI.motivation: 研究再生组织球体中模式形成的力学化学模型，探索形态发生素动力学与组织力学通过正反馈环耦合的机制，其中机械拉伸增强形态发生素产生，而形态发生素浓度调节组织弹性。
AI.techniques: 变分公式化、线性稳定性分析、分岔分析（亚临界和超临界叉形分岔、折叠分岔）、全局应变守恒实现非局部抑制效应、局部激活-长程抑制机制的力学化学变体。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对于指数弹性-形态发生素耦合，系统允许变分公式化；2) 证明小扩散时非恒定稳态解的存在性；3) 大扩散时齐次稳态解的唯一性；4) 线性稳定性分析表明只有单峰模式稳定，多峰解不稳定；5) 分岔分析揭示亚临界和超临界叉形分岔，折叠分岔产生双稳态区域。
AI.significance: 证明了力学化学反馈为单峰模式形成提供了稳健机制，无需第二个可扩散抑制剂，为组织再生中的模式形成提供了新的理论框架，将经典Turing机制推广到力学化学耦合系统。

title: Convergence to equilibrium for a class of coagulation-fragmentation equations without detailed balance
summary: We prove convergence to equilibrium for a class of coagulation-fragmentation equations that do not satisfy a detailed balance condition. More precisely, we consider perturbations of constant rate kernels. Our result provides in particular explicit convergence rates. Uniqueness of the stationary states is proven as well for the considered class of kernels.

AI.tldr: 证明了不满足细致平衡条件的凝聚-破碎方程收敛到平衡态，特别针对常数速率核的扰动情形
AI.motivation: 凝聚-破碎方程在统计物理中描述粒子聚集和分裂过程，通常假设细致平衡条件保证热力学平衡。本文研究不满足这一条件的更一般情形，特别是常数速率核的扰动类，这在物理应用中更广泛但理论分析更困难。
AI.techniques: 使用扰动分析方法处理非细致平衡系统；可能涉及Lyapunov函数、熵方法或谱理论；通过构造适当的泛函证明收敛性；利用核的特殊结构（常数速率核的扰动）简化分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对常数速率核的扰动类，证明了凝聚-破碎方程解收敛到平衡态；2. 给出了显式的收敛速率估计；3. 证明了该类核对应的稳态解的唯一性。
AI.significance: 突破了传统细致平衡条件的限制，扩展了凝聚-破碎方程收敛理论的应用范围；显式收敛速率为实际计算和模拟提供了理论保证；稳态唯一性结果是该领域的重要进展。

title: Confinement results near point vortices on the rotating sphere
summary: We study the Euler equation on the rotating sphere in the case where the absolute vorticity is initially sharply concentrated around several points. We follow the literature already concerning vorticity confinement for the planar Euler equations, and obtain similar results on the rotating sphere, with new challenges due to the geometry. More precisely, we show the improbability of collisions for point-vortices, logarithmic in time absolute vorticity confinement for general configurations, the optimality of this last result in general, and the existence of configurations with power-law long confinement. We take this opportunity to write a unified, self-contained, and improved version of all the proofs, previously scattered across multiple papers on the planar case, with detailed exposition for pedagogical clarity.

AI.tldr: 在旋转球面上研究初始绝对涡度集中分布在多个点附近的欧拉方程，建立了点涡碰撞不可能性、对数时间涡度约束等结果
AI.motivation: 研究旋转球面上欧拉方程的涡度约束问题，将平面欧拉方程中关于涡度集中分布的研究推广到球面几何，处理几何带来的新挑战
AI.techniques: 采用与平面情况类似但适应球面几何的分析框架，统一并改进了平面情况下的证明方法，包含详细的数学推导
AI.main_theorems: 证明了点涡碰撞不可能性、一般配置下对数时间绝对涡度约束、该结果的普适最优性，以及存在幂律长时间约束的配置
AI.significance: 将平面欧拉方程的涡度约束理论推广到旋转球面，为球面流体动力学提供理论基础，统一并改进了现有证明方法

title: An eigenvalue problem for a generalized polyharmonic operator in Orlicz-Sobolev spaces without the $Δ_2$-condition
summary: In this paper, we consider a generalized polyharmonic eigenvalue problem of the form $A(u)= λh(u)$ in a bounded smooth domain with Dirichlet boundary conditions in the setting of higher-order Orlicz-Sobolev spaces. Here, $A$ is a very general operator depending on $u$ and arbitrary higher-order derivatives of $u$, whose growth is governed by an Orlicz function, and $h$ is a lower order term. Combining the theories of pseudomonotone operators with complementary systems, we prove that this eigenvalue problem has an infinite number of eigenfunctions and that the corresponding sequence of eigenvalues tends to infinity. We point out that the $Δ_2$-condition is not assumed for the involved Orlicz functions. Finally, we prove a first regularity result for eigenfunctions by following a De Giorgi's iteration scheme.

AI.tldr: 在Orlicz-Sobolev空间中研究广义多调和特征值问题，证明了无限多特征函数的存在性和特征值趋于无穷大
AI.motivation: 研究高阶Orlicz-Sobolev空间中广义多调和特征值问题，其中算子A的增长由Orlicz函数控制，且不假设Δ₂条件，扩展了经典椭圆特征值问题的理论框架
AI.techniques: 结合伪单调算子理论与互补系统方法，使用De Giorgi迭代方案证明特征函数的正则性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了该特征值问题存在无限多个特征函数，对应特征值序列趋于无穷大；首次证明了特征函数的正则性结果
AI.significance: 在更一般的Orlicz-Sobolev框架下建立了特征值理论，不依赖Δ₂条件，为非线性椭圆问题的谱理论提供了新工具
